assertionResults.title: 2. POST /api/v1/jobs with valid JWT but role=freelancer -> 403

assertionResults.title: 3. POST /api/v1/jobs with valid JWT, role=client, valid body -> 201

assertionResults.title: 4. GET /api/v1/jobs -> 200 with paginated list

assertionResults.title: 5. GET /api/v1/jobs/search?q=react -> 200 with results
